title: A Nerds' Clustering
body: See image. Emrie is working with a candy company to analyze the popular candy: Nerds Gummy Clusters. For each piece of candy, he records the size, but the candy production line does not label the flavor of each candy. He does know that the candies come from exactly two distinct flavors. He would like to try to identify these two distinct groups from this feature alone. His unlabeled data is shown below:\n##figure1.gif
